idea.title: Difficulty Curve
idea.hook: Drag tower-defense waves up or down to keep the fun-meter inside a moving target band.
idea.hook_ru: Тяни столбики волн TD вверх или вниз, чтобы попасть в скрытую полосу веселья.
idea.prototype: Side-view 2D graph: x-axis = level 1-20, y-axis = difficulty 0-100. 20 wave bars stand on each level, defaulting to 50. Drag each bar up/down (cost = 1 budget per grab). Hidden 'ideal curve' band reveals as you commit waves — bars near touched neighbors glow brighter and show the dashed ideal line. Score = % of placed waves inside the band on SUBMIT. Lose = budget hits 0 before all 20 waves placed OR final score below 40%. Daily seed = different ideal curve generated from low-frequency sinusoid blend.
idea.mutation_of: Meta-puzzle about level design itself, inspired by 'define difficulty ramps before adding content' production-craft signal. Mutates a hidden-curve detective puzzle into a graph-editor game.
idea.why_novel: Self-referential meta-game: the player IS the level designer, not the level player. Information drip via band-reveal-on-touch makes probe-vs-commit an explicit economy. No countdown timer — pressure is purely click budget + score threshold.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Click budget (30 clicks for 20 waves = 1.5 per bar) + 40% score floor
idea.lose_condition: budget <= 0 AND wavesPlaced < TOTAL_WAVES, OR (wavesPlaced >= TOTAL_WAVES AND score < MIN_SCORE_PCT)

sources.title: Difficulty Curve
sources.snippet: Entry #4 — Difficulty Curve: drag tower-defense waves up or down to keep the fun-meter inside a moving target band. Side-view 2D graph, 20 wave bars, click budget, daily seed.

sources.title: Define difficulty ramps before adding content
sources.snippet: Production-craft signal #3: difficulty curve design as a reusable skill before content authoring.

sources.title: Game design fundamentals
sources.snippet: Vibecoding channel post about systematic game design loops.

sources.title: Daily-seed share loop pattern
sources.snippet: Daily-seed puzzles create natural sharable scores for retention.

synthesizer_brief: Meta-puzzle: 20 wave bars on a 0-100 graph, 30-click budget, hidden ideal curve that band-reveals around touched bars. Win = 40% inside band. Daily seed rotates the target curve so each day is a fresh detective puzzle.
